---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the terraform skills bundle
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or use case

What are you trying to achieve? Describe the problem, workflow, or limitation you are facing.

## Proposed solution

How could this repository help? Describe the feature, improvement, or new skill you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered or tried other approaches? List any workarounds or alternative solutions.

## Additional context

Add any other context, such as links to related Terraform modules, documentation, examples, or prior art.
